scripts.test:all: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.test:coverage: c8 --reporter=text --reporter=lcov --check-coverage --lines 90 --functions 90 --statements 90 --include packages/trust/src/scoring.ts --include packages/leads/src/rules.ts --include packages/reviews/src/rules.ts --include packages/communication/src/rules.ts --include packages/discovery/src/scoring.ts --include packages/profiles/src/slug.ts --include apps/web/src/app/dashboard/billing/billing-plan-selector.tsx --include apps/web/src/components/analytics/metrics-bar-chart.tsx --include apps/web/src/components/cms/cms-page-renderer.tsx --include apps/web/src/components/integrations/integration-status-cards.tsx npm run test:all
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.validate:release: npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e
